issues_found: Data provenance mismatch: Table 2 uses iter_003 data (constant=90.13), Figure 3(a) uses iter_006 data (constant=89.80). The 0.33pp cross-iteration shift EXCEEDS the paper's headline 0.25pp spread claim. The central quantitative finding is confounded by uncontrolled batch variance. This has been flagged since iter_007 (3 iterations).

Figure 4 (BEM scatter plot) shows half_lambda at BEM~0.0; Table 6 correctly reports BEM=0.500. Direct visual contradiction. Flagged in iter_007, iter_008, AND iter_009. Three consecutive iterations unfixed. Either the figure generation code has a bug or it reads stale data.

Three contradictory spread numbers for AdamW + ResNet-20 + CIFAR-10: Figure 3(a) annotation '0.49pp', Section 5.1 text '0.25pp', Table 2 data computes to 0.25pp. The 0.49pp comes from iter_006 data with a different method set (including PMP-WD). A paper that contradicts itself on its central quantitative claim is not submittable.

No ImageNet experiments despite project constraints mandating them. 5+ iterations of failure with no root cause diagnosis. Every comparable paper at top venues includes ImageNet or larger-scale validation. Paper's conclusions about 'modern deep learning' are confined to CIFAR-10/100 with <=15M parameter models.

PMP-WD ghost method: appears in Figure 3(a) but not in Table 1 (method catalog), Table 2 (main results), Table 3 (statistical tests), or Table 6 (diagnostic metrics). Figure 3(a) shows 6 methods (including PMP-WD, excluding half_lambda/random_mask) while Figure 3(b) shows 7 different methods. Cross-architecture spread comparison is invalid when method sets differ between panels.

Statistical power insufficient for null-result paper. N=3 seeds gives ~15-20% power to detect delta=0.5% effects. TOST equivalence confirmed in only 6/12 comparisons at delta=1.0%. The paper's headline claim 'all methods are statistically equivalent' is not supported by the evidence: 'we failed to reject the null at low power' is not the same as 'we confirmed equivalence.'

CSI has arbitrary weights (w1=0.4, w2=0.3, w3=0.3), does not predict accuracy (rho<0.3, p>0.3). The 'sensitivity analysis' with three nearly-identical weight sets is insufficient validation. CSI occupies significant paper real estate (definition, table, figure, discussion) for zero demonstrated predictive or diagnostic value. Listed as a 'contribution' in Section 1.3.

Section 5.7 (Cumulative Alignment Analysis, previously Section 5.8) reports non-significant correlations (rho=-0.379, p=0.121 and rho=0.045, p=0.858). The claim that 'directional difference (|Delta rho|=0.424) suggests cumulative alignment may be more informative' draws a conclusion from two non-significant results without a formal test. This was flagged in iter_007 and iter_008.

Abstract claims '105 experiments across 7 methods, 2 optimizers, 2 architectures, 2 datasets' implying full factorial design. Actual design is non-factorial: ResNet-20 gets 84 runs (7x2x2x3), VGG-16-BN gets 21 runs (7x1x1x3, SGD/CIFAR-10 only). Reviewer will expect VGG-16-BN AdamW results or CIFAR-100 VGG results.

Scope collapse from proposal to paper. Proposal promises Lyapunov stability, PMP optimal control, controller taxonomy, formal budget equivalence theorem. Paper delivers Phi taxonomy + empirical null result. The pivot to empirical-only is the RIGHT move, but proposal.md still lists 4 theorems and 2 propositions. Figure filename 'theorem2_validation.png' is vestigial.
issues_fixed: Section 5.7 (Certified Band / Lyapunov) REMOVED -- eliminates the V_t contradiction that persisted for 5 iterations (iter_008 S2: FIXED)
Build manifest removed from paper end (iter_008 W11: FIXED)
Evaluation metric specified: 'best test accuracy over 200 epochs' added to Section 4 (iter_008 W7: FIXED)
Alignment deviation symbols (delta_t, bar_delta_T, delta_T^sup) now defined in Section 5.7 (iter_008 W3: PARTIALLY FIXED -- still presented as if positive result)
Experiment count decomposition added to abstract: 84+21=105 (iter_008 W1: PARTIALLY FIXED)
SWD h() function form specified (iter_008 W5: FIXED)
Proposition 1 downgraded to inline remark (iter_008 W10: FIXED)
Conjecture qualifiers added to abstract (iter_008 W6: FIXED)
NoBN data integrated into Section 6.2 (iter_008 D1: FIXED)
Figure numbering renumbered consistently 1-8 (iter_008 W4: FIXED)
